_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Webstack - Apache PHP MariaDB phpMyAdmin
author: jonas@local.invalid
description: Single Pterodactyl webstack appliance: Apache/PHP website on the primary allocation, phpMyAdmin on a second allocation, and MariaDB bound only to 127.0.0.1 inside the container. TLS is expected to terminate at an external Nginx reverse proxy.

variables.name: phpMyAdmin Port
variables.description: Must match the server's second Pterodactyl allocation. The egg cannot discover additional allocation ports automatically.

variables.name: Database Name
variables.description: Initial application database name. Only used on first MariaDB initialization.

variables.name: Database User
variables.description: Initial application database user. Credentials are generated on first boot and stored in config/database.env.

variables.name: Database Admin User
variables.description: MariaDB administrator used for phpMyAdmin and internal health checks. The password is generated on first boot.
